security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src 'self' blob: data:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost 'self' wss: https:; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.longDescription: Zenth is a secure messaging application developed by Zenth Corporation. It provides end-to-end encryption using post-quantum cryptography (Kyber, Dilithium), Double Ratchet and X3DH key exchange protocols, ensuring that your messages, files, and communications remain private and protected against both classical and quantum threats.
